arts.sum: Brighton captain Lewis Dunk has been left out of Brighton’s starting XI to face Nottingham Forest in the FA Cup quarter final, despite his return from injury.

arts.ttl: Report: Brighton & Hove Albion open to selling young attacker in summer
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion are open to selling Julio Enciso this summer, with a price tag of around €30 million set for a permanent transfer. arts.ttl: Brighton vs Nottingham Forest: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest travel down to the south coast for their FA Cup quarter-final with Brighton on Saturday evening. Fabian Hurzeler has mitigated his first season in England with a constantly lengthy injury list, and Brighton are set to be without a whole host of players for Saturday's FA Cup quarter-final.

arts.ttl: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Nottingham Forest: Visitors looking to end 27-year streak in FA Cup quarter-final tie
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest will be looking to end a 27-year streak when they square off against Brighton & Hove Albion in the FA Cup quarter-finals on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest transfer news: Evangelos Marinakis 'planning ambitious' bid for international forward
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are allegedly prepared to involve themselves in the race to sign Napoli forward Victor Osimhen during the summer transfer window.
